name: Feature request

## Problem statement

What contributor/user problem are you solving?

## Proposed solution

What should be built? Include scope and acceptance criteria.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives were evaluated and why were they not chosen?

## Does this touch the bug registry?

- [ ] Yes, this change adds or updates intentional bug entries
- [ ] No, this change does not modify `data/bugs/*.json`
